text:
1800 minutes of the zodiac circle in one rotation] The words
Chooda pada, Sookshma Hora and Sookshma Lagna are
synonymous.
Some astrologers argue that the same is a method given
for BT rectification. There are some Kerala texts (in
Malayalam language), like Madhaveeyam Prasnasara of 14th
century, that tells us that if we multiply lagna longitude with
972 it should give longitude of Moon or its trine N akshatras
at BT. Thus clearly stated-
Lagna longitude x 972 = Moon's longitude at BT or its
trines.
This method helps us in doing a maximum correction of
32 seconds only.
Demerits of Sookshma Lagna method
1) lt helps us to do a correction of maximum 32 seconds
only. Mere 32 seconds correction is not of much use in
practical situations.
2) Neither Brihat Jataka nor Saravali clearly states that the
same can be used for BT rectification (even though
Prasnasara states that)
3) The authentic nature of this method is doubtful.

80 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification
10.
